subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The esteemed Rustam Khudadad, in the fervor of his love and devotion, hath earnestly requested the writing of a letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء جناب رستم خداداد از شدت محبت و وداد خواهش نگارش نامه از
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @consolation and comfort
